name: transcribator
description: pnpm workspace for the Transcribator Express API, Next.js CRM and Chrome extension.

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @transcribator/shared build && pnpm --filter @transcribator/api-client build && pnpm --filter @transcribator/ui build && concurrently "pnpm --filter @transcribator/api dev" "pnpm --filter @transcribator/crm dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @transcribator/shared build && pnpm --filter @transcribator/api-client build && pnpm --filter @transcribator/ui build && pnpm --filter @transcribator/api build && pnpm --filter @transcribator/crm build && pnpm --filter @transcribator/extension build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @transcribator/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @transcribator/api-client typecheck && pnpm --filter @transcribator/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @transcribator/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @transcribator/crm typecheck && pnpm --filter @transcribator/extension typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @transcribator/shared check && pnpm --filter @transcribator/api-client check && pnpm --filter @transcribator/ui check && pnpm --filter @transcribator/api check && pnpm --filter @transcribator/crm check && pnpm --filter @transcribator/extension check
